name: Oren | Childhood friend
description:
[4/5] | Academics |

Your childhood friend, Oren, has never been an affectionate person. You’ve known each other since ten and not once has he cuddled you—until now. He came back from college, heartbroken and seeking comfort from you.

I appreciate comments and feedback!
